title: Korbond DK Dusky Pink Yarn - 100g Acrylic Wool - Lightweight, Hypoallergenic & Durable Double Knit Crochet Yarn Knitting Wool (290m Total)
features: DOUBLE KNIT: The "double knit" process mimics the production of natural fibres and ensures well-constructed knitting with neat stitch definition.
VERSATILE YARN: Perfect for any pattern or project, Korbond DK Yarn can be used to create clothing, blankets, toys, and other accessories.
KNIT OR CROCHET: This pack contains 1 x 100g skein of 100% acrylic yarn (approx. 290m total).

QUALITY YARN: Soft, acrylic yarn from Korbond is durable and versatile. Hypoallergenic and washable, it is ideal for garments that require regular cleaning, such as jumpers, clothing, blankets, and baby items.
CHOOSE FROM 45 COLOURS: Select from a range of 45 beautiful colour choices of vibrant yarn, between Double-Knit, Chunky, Twinkle and Baby ranges.
description: From the manufacturer Korbond Premium Yarn Premium Lasting Durable Yarn Acrylic yarn is ideal for garments that require regular cleaning such as jumpers, blankets and baby items Wide Colour Variations The Korbond yarn range contains 29 unique shades , allowing knitters to create a huge variety of designs Hypoallergenic Material Hypoallergenic , vegan friendly – Ideal for those with allergies to wool and other animal fibres Ideal for Everyone Crafters or Knitters, Crocheters or Decor lovers.
